description: entry.endpoint (a URL/path field) is used as the HMAC shared_secret for WebhookProtocolHandler. The endpoint value appears in logs routing and monitoring — exposing the secret to anyone with log access. This is an insecure-credential bug in existing production code.
proposed_fix: Add a dedicated shared_secret field to ProtocolEntryConfig in wiring/config/loader.py; remove endpoint reuse from protocol_provider.py:78; load the secret from env vars or vault instead
